title: Platform Integration Proposal
executive_summary: Northwind seeks a unified reporting layer across three ERP instances. We propose a ten-week engagement covering discovery, integration, validation, and rollout with dedicated solution engineering support.

scope.item: Inventory sync between ERP and analytics warehouse
Custom KPI dashboard templates for operations leadership
Runbook and admin training for internal BI team

pricing.terms: Net 30 · 50% at kickoff · 50% at UAT acceptance

assumptions: Northwind provides VPN and sandbox credentials within 5 business days
Change requests outside scope require signed change order
next_steps: Executive review of scope and pricing
Sign SOW and schedule kickoff workshop
